seoTitle: Nathan vs Nearum — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Nathan and Nearum. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nathan and Nearum.
heading: Nathan vs Nearum — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nathan, Queensland and Nearum, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nathan and Nearum have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Nathan or Nearum safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nathan has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Nearum scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nathan scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Nearum scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nathan or Nearum?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nathan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
